items.title: Claude Code — Anthropic's CLI for Claude
items.summary: Claude Code is Anthropic's official command-line tool that brings Claude directly into your terminal. It can edit files, run commands, search code, and perform agentic tasks across your entire codebase. Designed for software engineers who want AI assistance without leaving the terminal.

items.title: Prompt Engineering Guide
items.summary: A comprehensive, community-driven guide covering prompt engineering techniques from basic to advanced. Topics include chain-of-thought prompting, few-shot learning, ReAct, and more. Essential reference for anyone building with LLMs.
